ddls:
CREATE TABLE "property_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the property category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property category */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was last updated */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each category for easier referencing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_valuations" (
  "valuation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each valuation entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property category */,
  "local_tax_roll_value" REAL /* Local tax roll value for the property category */,
  "mean_ratio" REAL /* Mean ratio estimate for the property category */,
  "ptad_value" REAL /* PTAD value estimate for the property category */,
  "value_assigned" REAL /* Value assigned to the property category */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the valuation metrics are recorded */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the valuation entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the valuation entry was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the valuation entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("valuation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_valuations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES property_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_valuations_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property category */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the property owner */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., single-family, multi-family) */,
  "property_size" REAL /* Size of the property in square feet */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_sold_date" TEXT /* Date the property was last sold */,
  "last_sold_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was last sold */,
  "tax_roll_value" REAL /* Local tax roll value of the property */,
  "mean_ratio" REAL /* Mean ratio estimate of the property */,
  "ptad_value" REAL /* PTAD value estimate of the property */,
  "value_assigned" REAL /* Value assigned to the property */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property owner */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., occupied, vacant) */,
  "property_use" TEXT /* Primary use of the property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the property record was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the property record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES property_owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES property_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "valuation_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each valuation history entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the valuation */,
  "local_tax_roll_value" REAL /* Local tax roll value for the year */,
  "mean_ratio" REAL /* Mean ratio estimate for the year */,
  "ptad_value" REAL /* PTAD value estimate for the year */,
  "value_assigned" REAL /* Value assigned for the year */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the valuation history entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the valuation history entry was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the valuation history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_valuation_histories_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_valuation_histories_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the property owner */,
  "owner_address" TEXT /* Address of the property owner */,
  "owner_city" TEXT /* City where the property owner is located */,
  "owner_state" TEXT /* State where the property owner is located */,
  "owner_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the property owner */,
  "owner_email" TEXT /* Email address of the property owner */,
  "owner_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the property owner */,
  "owner_type" TEXT /* Type of owner (e.g., individual, corporation) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the owner record was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the owner record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was sold */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., sale, transfer) */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the sales transaction */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the sales transaction was recorded */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the sales transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the property feature */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the property feature was added */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the property feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_records" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the tax record */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax due */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for tax payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the tax was paid */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tax payment (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tax record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax record was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_records_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_records_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, assessor, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged into the system */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
